description: Style Note lucera, or & lsquo luminous star& rsquo in Spanish, is designed for fashionistas who like to shine! Lucera fashion jewellery offers contemporary designs to complement the various moods of the modern and fashion conscious woman of today. What makes these earrings a must buy is the fact that these earrings are easily paired and will match most of the outfits in your wardrobe in elegance and style. Product Details Golden coloured earrings Golden coloured studs with encrusted crystals Push back closure Material and Care Gold plated silver and Crystals Wipe with a cotton swab when needed
